decisions.rationale: PasteHtml is async, can't run in callCommand. ToJSON is synchronous and lossless.
Manual property enumeration misses images and requires maintenance on OO updates.

decisions.decision: Fallback to Clone path when no snapshot
decisions.rationale: Graceful degradation, marked as legacy to remove later.
